title: Kalevala: The Tragedy of Aino
description: Young Aino is promised in marriage to the old sage Vainamoinen. Rather than submit, she walks into the sea and drowns — the most tragic episode in the Kalevala.
introduction: Young Aino is promised in marriage to the old sage Vainamoinen. Rather than submit, she walks into the sea and drowns — the most tragic episode in the Kalevala.

translation.text: Aino walked to the shore. She stepped onto a rock in the sea. The rock sank under her. The water covered her. Aino was gone forever. Vainamoinen wept.
